notes:
fix(ci): grant contents:write so the publish step can push to main

The v0.1.1 release build got all the way through build, sign, and
manifest generation, then failed at the final push with a 403:
"Permission to rodrigocruzs/fluent.git denied to github-actions[bot]".
The workflow had no `permissions:` block, so it inherited the repo's
default (read-only) GITHUB_TOKEN scope. Add contents:write so the
"Publish installer + manifest to website" step's git push succeeds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
